plugins.name: mhc-h
plugins.description: MHC-H — Meaningful Human Control harness per lavoro intellettuale assistito da AI. Quattro skill MVP (mhc-start, mhc-trace, mhc-decision, mhc-end) che orchestrano sessioni governate con audit trail append-only, dialectical reasoning, provenance-tracked output. Backend HTTP REST su api.mhc.regia.it (Bearer auth). Domain-agnostic: lavoro legale, ricerca, medical peer review, policy, engineering ADR, journalism, compliance. AGPL-3.0.
